title: Add Remember Me Feature
description: Implement a remember me checkbox that controls whether the session persists across app restarts.
instructions:
Extend the login flow with a 'Remember Me' option:

1. Add a 'Remember Me' checkbox to the login screen
2. When checked:
   - Store refresh token securely (flutter_secure_storage)
   - Session persists after app restart
   - Auto-login on next app launch

3. When unchecked:
   - Store access token in memory only
   - User must login again after app restart
   - No persistent storage of credentials

4. Handle the auto-login logic in the app's initialization:
   - Check if 'remember me' was enabled and token exists
   - Validate token with server before auto-logging in
   - Clear stored data if user chose not to be remembered

hints.text: Store the 'rememberMe' preference separately from tokens so you know how to handle them.
For non-remembered sessions, keep tokens in a simple variable or StateNotifier, not in persistent storage.
On logout, always clear both memory and persistent storage to ensure complete session termination.
